input: From ai-agents PR #1617 (refactor agents to Cynefin-aware eval framework, 44 commits). Eleven agent prompt files each had repeated sections (autonomy guardrail, reviewer asymmetry, output-shape contract, eval cycle). The repetition was load-bearing on different fields. Proposal: extract the four shared sections into one shared.md per agent type and import. Should this happen, and what is the boundary risk?
